about.heading: Hi, I'm Aina - the person behind DigitalPages.
about.paragraph1: I'm a young creative mind passionate about design, technology and building digital experiences that actually feel alive. DigitalPages started as a simple idea: create websites that don't just look good, but help people grow.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy combining design, development and automation to build modern solutions for real-world problems. When I'm not working on projects, I'm usually learning something new, exploring ideas or just enjoying life and being myself.

portfolio.heading: Projects that define DigitalPages
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of digital experiences, experiments and future projects.

project1.title: Coming Soon
project1.description: First client project will appear here.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you might want to know before working with DigitalPages.

q1.question: What services do you offer?
q1.answer: Web development, AI solutions, automation, UI/UX design, video editing and social media growth strategies.

q2.question: Do you work with small businesses?
q2.answer: Yes. DigitalPages is designed to help both small projects and growing businesses build a strong digital presence.

q3.question: How long does a project take?
q3.answer: It depends on the complexity, but most projects take between 1 to 4 weeks.

q4.question: Can I request a custom project?
q4.answer: Absolutely. Every project is custom and tailored to your needs and goals.

q5.question: How can I contact you?
q5.answer: You can use the contact form below or send an email to dp.digitalpages@gmail.com.

contact.heading: Let's build something great
contact.subtitle: Have an idea? A project? Or just want to say hi? Let's talk.

assistant.greeting: Hello — I'm Digi, your assistant. Ask me anything about the site.
assistant.help: Hi! I'm Digi — how can I help you today?
assistant.services: I can help with web development, AI solutions, automation, UI/UX and video editing. Want to see examples?
assistant.portfolio: You can find projects in the Work section. Would you like me to scroll there?
assistant.contact: I can open the contact form for you — shall I?
assistant.pricing: Pricing depends on scope. Tell me the project type and I can give a rough estimate.
assistant.about: DigitalPages is led by Aina and delivers web design, AI automation, and digital experiences that help businesses grow.
assistant.process: I work by understanding your goals, designing a clean concept, building a responsive experience, and refining it until your site is launch-ready.
assistant.tech: I use modern web tools and clean code to build fast, accessible, mobile-first websites that align with your brand.
assistant.automation: I can automate workflows, implement AI-enhanced features, and connect your website with the tools that save you time.
assistant.design: I create user-focused interfaces, strong brand messaging, and layouts that guide visitors toward your goals.
assistant.maintenance: After launch, I can support updates, content changes, performance checks, and ongoing improvements.
assistant.best_practice: My recommended approach is mobile-first design, fast loading, clear calls-to-action, and consistent brand styling.
assistant.build_site: Yes, I can create a website for your business. Tell me the main goal, audience and features you need, and I’ll suggest the best plan.
assistant.why_choose: I combine modern design, technical efficiency and a professional process to deliver websites and automation that help your business grow.
assistant.thanks: You're welcome! Anything else I can help with?
assistant.language: Use the language selector in the navbar to change languages.
assistant.unknown: Sorry, I didn't catch that. You can ask about services, process, design, automation, or say 'contact' to open the form.
assistant.open_work: Click here to go to Work.
